creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mikhail Teterin from comment #2)
> where the reporter obtained clang-4.0 to begin with...

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/projects/clang400-import/?view=log

$ poudriere jail -cj clang40-i386 -a i386 -v projects/clang400-import -m svn

(In reply to commit-hook from comment #3)
> Upgrade from 1.9 to 2.2.

Have you tested consumers aren't broken? At least bump their PORTREVISION since SOVERSION has changed.

https://abi-laboratory.pro/tracker/timeline/x265/
